name: The Godfather
description: Crime boss Vito Corleone and his sons, the ruthless yet loyal members of the Corleone family, rule their secretive New York empire with an iron fist.

name: Jason Bourne
description: The CIA's most dangerous former operative is drawn out of hiding to uncover more explosive truths about his past.

name: The Shawshank Redemption
description: Two life sentences for a 1947 double murder land an innocent man in the notorious and corrupt Maine State Penitentiary.

name: Ocean's Eleven
description: Dapper Danny Ocean organizes a gang to steal $150 million from three Las Vegas casinos in a single heist.

name: Bones on the Big Island

name: Days of Thunder
description: An upstart stock-car driver goes to the edge for his manager, his brain-surgeon girlfriend and himself.

name: Fish or Cut Bait
description: Barry is ready to start dating for the first time in 25 years; Kim puts her trust in Lydia's hands; Ethan puts it all on the line in a make-or-break decision.

name: Wanted Drunk or Alive
description: Tickle makes tariff-free apple brandy to help resolve the shortage of American liquor on Canadian shelves. Mike and Jerry learn they're wanted men.

name: The Devil Wears Prada
description: A recent college graduate lands a job working for a famous and diabolical editor of a New York fashion magazine.
